## LazyInstantiator.materializing property

A convenience view where `get()` materializes values and caches them into [loaded](./ts-utils.collections.lazyinstantiator.loaded.md)<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly materializing: MaterializingResultMapView<TKey, TValue>;
```

## Remarks

- `has()`<!-- -->/`keys()` reflect the full keyspace in [base](./ts-utils.collections.lazyinstantiator.base.md) and do not materialize. - `get()`<!-- -->/iteration methods materialize values as needed and cache them into [loaded](./ts-utils.collections.lazyinstantiator.loaded.md)<!-- -->.
